Your Future Begins Here

Luxury Rehab in Florida, Offering Multiple Pathways to Recovery from Addiction and Mental Health Conditions

Our Programs
Get Help Now

What We Treat

At Futures Recovery Healthcare luxury rehab, we address a wide range of behavioral health needs, including substance use disorder (SUD), co-occurring disorders, trauma, and primary mental health conditions. Our approach is grounded in evidence-based practices and a holistic approach that combines somatic medicine, psychotherapies, physical therapy, and wellness services.

Futures CORE Program

Detox Residential & Outpatient Care

Our dual-diagnosis residential luxury rehab program offers a comprehensive approach with extensive clinical hours and integrated care. We provide a blend of Integrated medical and Psychiatric services, Psychotherapy, Integrated Trauma Treatment, Physical Therapy, Wellness Services, Family Programming, and Alumni Support, all designed to ensure continuous care and to help you build a strong foundation in recovery.

Get Help for Addiction

Futures RESET Program

Mental Health, Residential & Outpatient Care

The Futures luxury mental health program delivers evidence-based therapies and interventions for a range of conditions, including anxiety, depression, trauma, and other mood and thought disorders. A private floor, dedicated group spaces, and a specialized team create a secure and private environment for effective healing.

Explore Mental Health

Our Facility

Recognized as a leading luxury residential treatment center, Futures Recovery Healthcare caters to adults 18 and older. Located in Tequesta, Florida, our family-owned and operated facility has been a beacon of care since 2012. Set on a lush, 9-acre campus with all services conveniently located under one roof, we offer a nurturing environment that fosters safety and community.

  • Private, Gated Facility
  • All services under one roof
  • Private Bedrooms
  • Private Bathrooms
  • Art Studio
  • Wellness Center & Spa
  • Pool & Hot Tub
  • Tennis & Pickleball Courts
  • Basketball & Volleyball Courts
  • Walking Meditations
Discover Our Facility
Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy
Tequesta, Florida 33469

Specialty Programs

Our HERO’S and ORENDA luxury rehab programs provide tailored recovery solutions for those with unique demands. HERO’S offers comprehensive support for first responders, veterans, and healthcare professionals, while ORENDA is designed for professionals and high-net-worth individuals, ensuring privacy, flexibility, and excellence in care.

Futures HERO’S Program

First Responders, Veterans & Healthcare

HERO’S Ascent at Futures targets mental health conditions common among first responders, healthcare professionals and veterans, such as trauma, chronic pain, and addiction. Our personalized care plans integrate medical treatment, psychiatry, individual and group therapy, physical therapy, and wellness services.

Learn More

Futures ORENDA Program

Professionals & High Net Worth Individuals

Orenda at Futures is designed for individuals with public personas and high-demand occupations who cannot escape stressors that fuel addiction and dysfunction. We offer concierge-level service and flexible programs for the most intensive, personalized care.

Learn More

Futures Programs Amenities

Accommodations & Comfort

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Wellness & Creative Living

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Recreation & Leisure (On-Site)

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Outdoor & Off-site Adventures

*Adventure-based therapies are optional services and are not included in the cost of treatment. Participation requires separate payment and may vary based on availability.

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Over a Decade of Quality Care

Futures Recovery Healthcare boasts a DCF state license, Joint Commission accreditation, and AHCA licensure. Our secure, private gated campus in Tequesta, Florida, offers a tranquil setting just miles from the Atlantic Coast. With a team of masters-level clinicians, medical professionals, and credentialed staff, we uphold the highest standards of care in behavioral healthcare.

Our Approach

At Futures, innovative healing methods thrive within a multidisciplinary framework and integrated luxury trauma treatment. Ethical client care is at the core of our practice. We aim to empower individuals to manage chronic health conditions effectively, guiding them toward a life that is authentic, productive, and joyful.

Contact Us

Are you looking for luxury rehab in Florida for yourself, a loved one, or a client? Connect with our experienced admissions team to discuss your needs confidentially and explore how we can assist. We work with most major insurance providers, including Aetna and Blue Cross/Blue Shield, and are dedicated to helping you maximize your coverage.

Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy
Tequesta, Florida 33469

Futures embraces the complexity of addiction, co-occurring mental health, and primary mental health conditions to empower recovery and improve outcomes through evidence-based practice, coordinated care, and mission-driven culture.

Admissions Overview

Taking the first step toward recovery requires courage, and we are here to support you every step of the way. At Futures Recovery Healthcare, our admissions process is designed to be simple, compassionate, and tailored to your needs.

Get Help Now

Our admissions counselors are available 24/7, ready to listen, guide, and determine how we can best support you.

With a team of experienced professionals, we assist individuals, families, and referring professionals in navigating their options. Whether it’s finding the right program at Futures or guiding you toward another provider better suited to your needs, we are committed to helping you take the next step.

How to Get Started

Beginning your journey at Futures Recovery Healthcare is straightforward. Follow these steps:

Reach Out

Contact our admissions team at any time; we are available 24/7 to answer your questions and guide you.

Initial Consultation

Our admissions counselors will conduct a confidential consultation to understand your needs and discuss how we can help.

Insurance Verification

We will verify your insurance benefits to provide an estimate of coverage and out-of-pocket costs.

Assessment and Admission

Our team will perform a comprehensive assessment to ensure the best fit for your care. If our program meets your needs, we will guide you through the admissions process. If another provider is better suited, we will provide referrals.

Verify Insurance

Futures Recovery Healthcare strives to make treatment accessible by working as an out-of-network provider with various insurance companies. Our experienced insurance verification specialists handle the complexities of communicating with providers, managing claims, and advocating for you, reducing your stress and simplifying the process.

Submit your information through the Insurance Verification Form or contact us directly at (866) 351-7588 to begin the verification process.

Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy
Tequesta, Florida 33469

Referrals

Our goal is to match each patient with the most appropriate care. If we determine that your needs would be better served by another provider, our knowledgeable team will offer referrals to specialized programs across the country. 

We work closely with a network of trusted providers to ensure that every individual receives the care they need.

Refer a client

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Recreation & Leisure (On-Site)

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Outdoor & Off-site Adventures

*Adventure-based therapies are optional services and are not included in the cost of treatment. Participation requires separate payment and may vary based on availability.

*The MetaVida Program is designed to integrate with any Futures program, allowing you and your care team to personalize your treatment with innovative outpatient services.

Contact Us


Ready to start your journey? Contact our admissions team today to discuss your options and take the first step toward a healthier, happier future.

From intensive, evidence-based treatment for substance use and mental health disorders to specialized programs, our approach integrates psychosomatic medicine, psychotherapy, and holistic wellness services. 

Explore our dedicated luxury treatment programs to find the right path for your recovery journey.

CORE Program

CORE Program

The CORE Program at Futures Recovery Healthcare is a dual-diagnosis program for adults addressing both substance use and co-occurring mental health conditions. This luxury rehab program integrates extensive clinical hours, evidence-based interventions, and a continuum of care that includes detox, residential, and outpatient services. It focuses on addiction and mental health disorders that often coexist, such as depression, anxiety, and mood disorders and treats them by providing holistic, personalized care plans tailored to individual needs.

Key Highlights:

  • Dual-diagnosis treatment for substance use and mental health conditions.
  • Comprehensive assessments for trauma and holistic interventions for chronic pain.
  • Continuum of care from detox to outpatient services.

RESET Program

RESET Program

The RESET Program provides comprehensive care for primary mental health conditions like anxiety, depression, and bipolar disorder. This program combines advanced assessment techniques, with personalized, evidence-based therapies. It offers residential and partial hospitalization options, focusing on empowering individuals to achieve stability and long-term mental wellness through intensive clinical services and supportive family involvement.

Key Highlights:

  • Dedicated care for primary mental health conditions.
  • Combines cutting-edge assessments with personalized treatment.
  • Offers both residential and partial hospitalization options.
  • Focus on rehabilitation, education, and empowerment.

ORENDA Program

ORENDA Program

This program delivers an adaptive and responsive continuum of care, meeting individuals precisely at their stage of recovery through comprehensive assessments and tailored integrated care plans. Emphasizing neurorestorative care, intensive individual and family therapy, and a broad range of wellness services, ORENDA provides a highly personalized treatment experience, designed to accommodate the demands of busy, high-profile lifestyles.

Verify Insurance

Start Your Journey to Recovery — We’re Here to Help You Understand Your Insurance Coverage.

Verifying your insurance coverage is the first step to accessing quality care. At Futures Recovery Healthcare, we work with many national insurance providers to help make our services more accessible. Our team is ready to guide you through the process, ensuring you get the most out of your benefits.

Why Verify Your Insurance

  • Gain a clear understanding of your covered services
  • Get an estimate of out-of-pocket expenses
  • Focus on YOUR recovery while we handle your insurance claims
Call Us Now866-351-7588
701 N Old Dixie Hwy

Insurance Information

At Futures Recovery Healthcare, we are committed to ensuring that our clients receive the highest quality care for addiction, mental health, and co-occurring conditions. We offer a no-obligation insurance verification service and collaborate closely with patients and their insurance providers to maximize benefits and streamline the coverage process. Whether you’re using private insurance or exploring self-pay options, our experienced specialists are here to guide you every step of the way.

Insurance Partnerships

We work with a broad range of major insurance providers. Our experienced team will guide you through the process to ensure you maximize your benefits and receive the care you need.

Expert Insurance Management

Our insurance specialists handle the communication and paperwork required to utilize your benefits effectively, streamlining the reimbursement process.

Navigating Insurance Coverage

Insurance plan coverage can vary significantly between carriers, and from state to state. Our team works directly with your provider to identify what is covered under your policy.

Partnering with Employer Groups and EAPs

Futures also works with groups that we have direct contracts with, including employer groups and Employee Assistance Programs (EAPs). Please inquire about whether your employer or group is contracted with us.

Futures embraces the complexity of addiction, co-occurring mental health, and primary mental health conditions to empower recovery and improve outcomes through evidence-based practice, coordinated care, and mission-driven culture.

HERO’S Program

Detox, Residential & Outpatient Program for Addiction & Co-Occurring Conditions

HERO’s is a dynamic luxury rehab program aimed at supporting individuals in their battle against substance abuse. By fostering resilience and personal growth, we help participants discover their inner strength and create a sustainable path to recovery.

Verify Insurance

About Our HERO’S Program

First Responder’s Alcohol & Drug Treatment

The HERO’s Veterans & First Responders luxury rehab in Florida is dedicated to addressing substance abuse and related mental health conditions, including chronic pain and underlying trauma, that are prevalent among first responders, veterans, and healthcare professionals.

This comprehensive luxury rehab program offers tailored care plans that integrate medical treatment, psychiatric support, individual and group psychotherapy, physical therapy, and wellness services. By connecting participants with peers who understand their unique challenges, we foster a strong sense of camaraderie and mutual support. Our robust alumni network provides ongoing inspiration and connection, supporting individuals long after their treatment journey has ended.

Download Brochure
Get Help Now

Our HERO’s Dual-Diagnosis Program offers

  • Luxury detox, residential treatment, PHP, and outpatient (IOP) tailored to individual needs.
  • A thorough assessment process to create a personalized recovery curriculum.
  • A clinical and holistic approach that addresses substance abuse, mental health and enhances overall wellness.
  • An innovative mix of evidence-based practices and cutting-edge treatment interventions that provide optimal care to target substance abuse, depression, anxiety, sleep disturbances and trauma which assist in fostering a solid continuing care plan for long-term mental wellness.
  • Dedicated spaces and a specialized team to support all heroes in their clinical work and personal time.
  • Exclusive groups for heroes to foster a supportive community.

Levels of Care

Detox

Our luxury detox provides medically supervised and medication-assisted treatment, supported by 24-hour nursing care and comprehensive clinical and therapeutic services to ensure a smooth and comfortable transition.

Learn More

Residential

The residential level of care offers round-the-clock support, detailed assessments, and personalized treatment plans. Individual and group therapy are integral to addressing diverse needs in a structured and supportive environment.

Learn More

Outpatient

PHP & IOP programs delivers a flexible and effective recovery solution, allowing individuals to balance treatment with their daily responsibilities.

Learn More

Individualized Treatment Plan

Advisory Board

The HERO’s Ascent program is shaped by an advisory board of veterans, first responders, military personnel, and healthcare professionals. Their ongoing support and consultation ensure the program meets the unique needs of these communities. Our team, experienced in working with responders and military professionals, understands the complexities of their roles, fostering effective therapeutic relationships.

Meet Our Advisory Board
Trauma

Specialized trauma treatment includes innovative approaches like eye movement desensitization and reprocessing (EMDR) and accelerated resolution therapy (ART). We address trauma with foundational techniques such as grounding, resourcing, and stabilization, complemented by sleep assistance and group therapy.

Pain

Our holistic approach to chronic pain incorporates specialized physical therapy, fitness programs, cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), graduated narcotic detoxification, targeted group therapy, and nutritional meal planning. We address the physical, emotional, and mental aspects of chronic pain through a comprehensive treatment plan.

Assessments

The HERO’S Ascent program offers a 96-hour assessment designed for an independent and thorough evaluation. This assessment is particularly valuable for individuals in safety-sensitive roles, such as first responders and healthcare professionals, to evaluate any mental, physical, or substance abuse issues that may impact their professional practice.

96 HR Assessment
Treatment Services

Available therapies encompass cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavior therapy (DBT), and motivational interviewing (MI), COGNITIVE BEHAVIORAL THERAPY FOR INSOMNIA CBT-I. In addition to these, our  HERO’S Program includes specialized treatments for chronic pain and trauma, such as EMDR therapy, ART, spiritual counseling, physical and recreational therapy, and clinical programming including ropes interventions, sleep assistance, and NADA protocol to assist with withdrawal symptoms.

In addition to the services above, Futures Recovery Healthcare offers:

Clinical & Medical
  • Full Medical Detoxification Onsite
  • History and Physical Evaluation 
  • 24-Hour Medical Care
  • Treatment for Substance Abuse and Co-occurring Disorders
  • Clinically Intensive Programming
  • Dual Diagnosis Treatment
  • Psychiatric Evaluation
  • Dialectical Behavioral Therapy
  • Cognitive Behavioral Therapy
  • Trauma Services
  • Chronic Pain Services 
  • Psychosocial Evaluation 
  • Relapse Prevention Education
  • 2 Individual Primary Therapy Sessions Week
  • 1 Individual Case Management/ Relapse Prevention Session per Week
  • Daily Groups to address the individual from physical, psychological and social/spiritual perspectives 
  • Ongoing AI assessment for depression and anxiety
Holistic Wellness
  • Continuing Care Planning and Support
  • Dedicated Family Support Specialist
  • 2-Day Family Program
  • Family Support Groups
  • Alumni Activities
  • Alumni Support Groups
  • Days of Ascent: Onsite alumni event held four times per year

About Our HERO’S Program

First Responder’s Alcohol & Drug Treatment

The HERO’s Veterans & First Responders luxury rehab in Florida is dedicated to addressing substance abuse and related mental health conditions, including chronic pain and underlying trauma, that are prevalent among first responders, veterans, and healthcare professionals.

This comprehensive luxury rehab program offers tailored care plans that integrate medical treatment, psychiatric support, individual and group psychotherapy, physical therapy, and wellness services. By connecting participants with peers who understand their unique challenges, we foster a strong sense of camaraderie and mutual support. Our robust alumni network provides ongoing inspiration and connection, supporting individuals long after their treatment journey has ended.

 
 Download Brochure 

 
 Get Help Now 

Our HERO’s Dual-Diagnosis Program offers

 

Luxury detox, residential treatment, PHP, and outpatient (IOP) tailored to individual needs.

A thorough assessment process to create a personalized recovery curriculum.

A clinical and holistic approach that addresses substance abuse, mental health and enhances overall wellness.

An innovative mix of evidence-based practices and cutting-edge treatment interventions that provide optimal care to target substance abuse, depression, anxiety, sleep disturbances and trauma which assist in fostering a solid continuing care plan for long-term mental wellness.

Dedicated spaces and a specialized team to support all heroes in their clinical work and personal time.

Exclusive groups for heroes to foster a supportive community.

Residential

The residential level of care offers round-the-clock support, detailed assessments, and personalized treatment plans. Individual and group therapy are integral to addressing diverse needs in a structured and supportive environment.

Outpatient

PHP & IOP programs delivers a flexible and effective recovery solution, allowing individuals to balance treatment with their daily responsibilities.

Individualized Treatment Plan

 

 

 Advisory Board 
 

 
 

 

The HERO’s Ascent program is shaped by an advisory board of veterans, first responders, military personnel, and healthcare professionals. Their ongoing support and consultation ensure the program meets the unique needs of these communities. Our team, experienced in working with responders and military professionals, understands the complexities of their roles, fostering effective therapeutic relationships.

 

 
 Meet Our Advisory Board 

 

 
 

 

 

 Trauma 
 

 
 

 

Specialized trauma treatment includes innovative approaches like eye movement desensitization and reprocessing (EMDR) and accelerated resolution therapy (ART). We address trauma with foundational techniques such as grounding, resourcing, and stabilization, complemented by sleep assistance and group therapy.

 

 
 

 

 

 Pain 
 

 
 

 

Our holistic approach to chronic pain incorporates specialized physical therapy, fitness programs, cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), graduated narcotic detoxification, targeted group therapy, and nutritional meal planning. We address the physical, emotional, and mental aspects of chronic pain through a comprehensive treatment plan.

 

 
 

 

 

 Assessments 
 

 
 

 

The HERO’S Ascent program offers a 96-hour assessment designed for an independent and thorough evaluation. This assessment is particularly valuable for individuals in safety-sensitive roles, such as first responders and healthcare professionals, to evaluate any mental, physical, or substance abuse issues that may impact their professional practice.

 

 
 96 HR Assessment 

 

 
 

 

 

 Treatment Services 
 

 
 

 

Available therapies encompass cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavior therapy (DBT), and motivational interviewing (MI), COGNITIVE BEHAVIORAL THERAPY FOR INSOMNIA CBT-I. In addition to these, our HERO’S Program includes specialized treatments for chronic pain and trauma, such as EMDR therapy, ART, spiritual counseling, physical and recreational therapy, and clinical programming including ropes interventions, sleep assistance, and NADA protocol to assist with withdrawal symptoms.
